rawAssistant: Just a small thing caught my eye - a faint trail of iridescent dust on the side road, not far from here. Could be nothing, but it looked like... almost a signature, if you know what I mean. Reminded me of the Glowwings we've been tracking. Worth taking a closer look, don't you think?
